name: Intoxicating Embrace
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] reels in [AttackerHisOrHer] vines, pulling your restrained form towards [AttackerHisOrHer]! Once you are within reach, she wraps her arms behind your head and places it between her large pillowy breasts, letting [TargetYouOrMonsterName] breathe in [AttackerHisOrHer] sweet intoxicating pheromones!
statusMiss: [AttackerName] reels in [AttackerHisOrHer] vines, pulling your restrained form towards [AttackerHisOrHer], but [TargetYouOrMonsterName] manage to resist the traction and hastily back away!
